calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioners Edward Jones and Patrick Joseph Winderl's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
